context: Tests whether the agent correctly models the B2B data layer: the companies, company_users, and company_catalogs tables with the right column types, constraints, and defaults. Also checks that billing information is stored at the company level rather than on individual users, and that company status and credit fields follow the prescribed schema.

checklist.name: companies.id is UUID
checklist.description: companies.id column uses UUID type with gen_random_uuid() as default

checklist.name: payment_terms CHECK constraint
checklist.description: companies.payment_terms has a CHECK constraint that includes exactly the values: prepay, net15, net30, net60, net90

checklist.name: credit stored in cents
checklist.description: Both credit_limit and credit_used on companies are INTEGER type (cents), not DECIMAL or FLOAT

checklist.name: credit_limit nullable
checklist.description: companies.credit_limit allows NULL (no NOT NULL constraint), meaning no limit

checklist.name: company status CHECK
checklist.description: companies.status has a CHECK constraint with values: pending, approved, suspended; defaults to 'pending'

checklist.name: billing_address JSONB on company
checklist.description: billing_address is stored as JSONB on the companies table, NOT on a users table

checklist.name: company_users role CHECK
checklist.description: company_users.role has a CHECK constraint with values: admin, buyer, approver, viewer; defaults to 'buyer'

checklist.name: spending_limit per user
checklist.description: company_users has a spending_limit INTEGER column (cents per order) that allows NULL

checklist.name: company_users UNIQUE
checklist.description: company_users has a UNIQUE constraint on (company_id, user_id)

checklist.name: company_catalogs custom_price nullable
checklist.description: company_catalogs.custom_price is INTEGER allowing NULL (meaning use volume pricing when NULL)

checklist.name: company_catalogs is_visible
checklist.description: company_catalogs has is_visible BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT true column

checklist.name: company_catalogs UNIQUE
checklist.description: company_catalogs has a UNIQUE constraint on (company_id, product_id)

checklist.name: tax_id column
checklist.description: companies table includes a tax_id column (VARCHAR type) for EIN/VAT numbers
